name: Zoal the Ever-Wakeful
location: Zoal the Ever-Wakeful in Elven Gardens District, Tel Var lockbox merchant

bonuses.stat: When you Break Free, you release a wave of Watcher energy, causing enemies within 8 meters of you to become Feared for 3 seconds. You also gain 0-34 Weapon and Spell Damage for each enemy hit, up to 6 enemies, for 7 seconds.
